blocked_on: Phase 7 scripted pick still fails to LIFT the cube. Cube alignment problem fully fixed (yaw=0, gripper stiffness/effort, close target 0.65, per-step cube tracking) - cube stays perfectly centered between closed pads - but grip doesn't hold during lift. Fingers close past cube (finger_q reaches 0.67) meaning cube escapes before lift-off. Suspect Robotiq pad collision geometry or mimic-chain physics. See reports/phase_7_findings.md.
notes: This session's iterations across 9 config variants (see logs/phase_7_rerun{1..9}*.log) resolved the cube-slides-during-close failure but surfaced a deeper grip-doesn't-hold-during-lift failure. Three paths forward documented: (P1) swap to NVIDIA Robotiq USD, (P2) fall back to human teleop (original Phase 6 plan) after fixing viewport freeze, (P3) tune PhysX solver iterations + contact offsets.
